task_routes.notes: CLI flags, run launch, resume, eval dispatch, and visible console output.
CLI and API backend execution, retries, session handling, and runtime session construction.
Run lifecycle, roadmap generation loop, review/falsifier flow, prompt assembly ladders, and resume behavior.
Persistent proof state, proof notes, and resume-from-MEMO logic.
Optional Lean statement/sketch checks and shared-workspace bootstrap/reuse.
Agent request payloads, parser contracts, and prompt text.

files.summary: Example: different backend+model for each agent.
Example: pure Phase 1 proof search with no Lean verification.
The Assistant Agent -- organizes MEMO and NOTES.
Base agent interface for all math proof agents.
The Blind Falsifier Agent -- independent counterexample checker.
The Formalizer Agent -- Lean-oriented code generation helper.
Helpers for loading prompt sections from bundled markdown files.
The Review Agent -- independent correctness check.
The Thinking Agent -- main proof reasoning worker.
Configuration loading and compatibility helpers for Math Agent.
Context window management -- progressive compression and progress tracking.
Prompt assembly helpers with graded degradation.
Document management for MEMO and NOTES.
MEMO document management - compressed research state that survives context resets.
Structured NOTES archive plus rendered markdown views.
Evaluation helpers for Math Agent v3.
Evaluation harness for Math Agent v3.
Lean 4 integration -- compiler, project scaffolding, module management.
Wraps Lean 4 compiler invocation and error parsing.
Search the installed Mathlib source for API names and signatures.
Lean project scaffolding -- lakefile, toolchain, and module management.
Lean Toolplane — unified interface for Lean interaction and search.
CLI entry point for Math Agent.
Orchestrator exports for Math Agent v3.
Phase 1 loop: mathematical proof (roadmap -> execute -> review).
Problem specifications and built-in problem registry for Math Agent.
ProblemSpec dataclass and built-in problem/suite registry.
Runtime layer for session-backed CLI and API execution.
Session-backed runtime abstraction for CLI and API backends.

symbols.name: AssistantAgent
symbols.summary: Organizes MEMO and NOTES for the proof pipeline.

symbols.name: StepResult
symbols.summary: Result of working on a single proof step.

symbols.name: RoadmapEvaluation
symbols.summary: Result of re-evaluating the roadmap after a step.

symbols.name: CompletenessCheck
symbols.summary: Result of checking whether proved steps cover the whole theorem.

symbols.name: ReviewResult
symbols.summary: Result of the review agent's independent evaluation.

symbols.name: BaseAgent
symbols.summary: Base interface for all agents.

symbols.name: FalsifyResult
symbols.summary: Result of a blind falsification attempt.

symbols.name: PythonCheckResult
symbols.summary: Result of running a Python verification script.

symbols.name: FalsifierAgent
symbols.summary: Blind falsifier -- sees only problem + claimed answer.

symbols.name: falsify
symbols.summary: Try to falsify a claimed answer/proof.

symbols.name: _run_python_sandbox
symbols.summary: Execute Python code in a subprocess sandbox.

symbols.name: _check_output_passed
symbols.summary: Heuristically determine if a Python check passed.

symbols.name: _extract_python_blocks
symbols.summary: Extract Python code blocks from LLM output.

symbols.name: _parse_verdict
symbols.summary: Parse the falsifier's verdict response.

symbols.name: FormalizerAgent
symbols.summary: Lean-facing helper for statement and sketch generation.

symbols.name: load_prompt_bundle
symbols.summary: Return a mapping of section name -> prompt text for *name*.

symbols.name: load_prompt_section
symbols.summary: Load a single prompt section from *bundle*.

symbols.name: render_prompt_section
symbols.summary: Render a prompt section with ``str.format`` substitution.

symbols.name: ReviewAgent
symbols.summary: Independent correctness checker for completed proofs.

symbols.name: ThinkingAgent
symbols.summary: Main proof reasoning worker.

symbols.name: generate_roadmaps
symbols.summary: Generate proof roadmaps for the given problem.

symbols.name: _format_divergence_instruction
symbols.summary: Render the strategic-divergence block for ``generate_roadmaps``.

symbols.name: split_overloaded_step
symbols.summary: Split an overloaded step into more focused sub-steps.

symbols.name: repair_step_with_feedback
symbols.summary: Retry a step with explicit repair feedback.

symbols.name: regenerate_macro_step
symbols.summary: Regenerate only the sub-steps for a failed macro-step.

symbols.name: work_step
symbols.summary: Work through a single proof step.

symbols.name: verify_proved_step
symbols.summary: Verify a previously proved step by reviewing its recorded proof.

symbols.name: formalize_statement
symbols.summary: Generate a Lean 4 theorem statement for the problem.

symbols.name: formalize_step_sketch
symbols.summary: Generate a Lean 4 lemma sketch for a proved step.

symbols.name: repair_proof
symbols.summary: Repair specific gaps identified by the reviewer.

symbols.name: diagnose_step_failure
symbols.summary: Diagnose WHY a step failed after multiple attempts.

symbols.name: re_evaluate_roadmap
symbols.summary: Re-evaluate the roadmap after a step has been proved.

symbols.name: re_evaluate_after_failure
symbols.summary: Re-evaluate the roadmap after a step has FAILED.

symbols.name: assess_completeness
symbols.summary: Check whether the proved steps already cover the full theorem.

symbols.name: fork
symbols.summary: Create a copy with the same client and a deep copy of the context.

symbols.name: _parse_roadmaps
symbols.summary: Best-effort parse of JSON roadmaps from LLM output.

symbols.name: _parse_string_array
symbols.summary: Extract a JSON string array from LLM output.

symbols.name: _derive_deliverable
symbols.summary: Create a non-empty deliverable label from a macro-step description.

symbols.name: _extract_step_description
symbols.summary: Extract a meaningful description string from a step.

symbols.name: _steps_to_list
symbols.summary: Convert steps from any format to a list of items.

symbols.name: _normalize_roadmaps
symbols.summary: Normalize roadmap shape so flat and hierarchical callers can share it.

symbols.name: _is_overloaded_step
symbols.summary: Heuristic filter for steps that hide work behind vague language.

symbols.name: _refine_overloaded_steps
symbols.summary: Split overloaded steps after roadmap generation.

symbols.name: _try_parse_updated_steps
symbols.summary: Attempt to extract updated steps JSON from re-evaluation output.

symbols.name: Hyperparameters
symbols.summary: Tunable search parameters for the Thinking Agent.

symbols.name: load_config
symbols.summary: Load configuration from TOML with compatibility for old provider configs.

symbols.summary: 4-layer progressive context compression.

symbols.summary: Check if the roadmap should be abandoned due to no progress.
